_meta.keyKnowledge: We are learning about our own special qualities and those of others, and how they help us become who we are.

_source.w: We are learning about our own special qualities and those of others, and how they help us become who we are.
y: Understanding our personal qualities builds confidence and self-awareness.
Recognising qualities in others teaches us appreciation and respect.
Our unique characteristics are what make us part of a diverse community.
eg: Listing three things we are good at and three things we enjoy.
Describing a friend's qualities — like being kind, funny, or helpful.
Talking about where our qualities come from — family, culture, experiences.
Drawing a self-portrait and writing words that describe us around it.
Discussing how our qualities help us at school and at home.
Celebrating the diversity of qualities in our class.
